chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 96 of 2016 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.9685/2017 2. For hearing of main case 22.01.2025 Mr. Pervaiz Iqbal Kasi advocate for the petitioner Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General This petition is pending since 2016. Provisional assessment has been done pursuant to the orders of this Court, however, final assessment remains. Learned counsel for the department submits that final assessment has been restrained in view of this petition. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he has no cavil if the final assessment is undertaken after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and if aggrieved the petitioner shall avail remedy before the statutory hierarchy. Learned counsel for respondent has no objection to this petition being disposed of as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
